title: ageratina pelotropha
intro: Ageratina pelotropha, also known as Pelotrope Ageratina, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to its compounds such as flavonoids and terpenes. The health benefits of Ageratina pelotropha include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular choice for treating various ailments in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Ageratina pelotropha can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
